app.name: MentalGuard
app.footer: An Agentic AI for Mental Health Awareness & Suicide Prevention

welcomeMessage: Hi, I'm MentalGuard. I'm here to listen, support, and help you through life's challenges. You're not alone—how are you feeling today?
defaultResponsePlaceholder: Click a prompt above to begin a conversation with MentalGuard.

prompts.label: I'm feeling anxious.
prompts.response: It's okay to feel anxious. Try taking a few slow breaths and focus on one thing you can control right now.

prompts.label: Help me manage stress.
prompts.response: Take a short break, hydrate, and write down the top three things on your mind. Small steps can make a big difference.

prompts.label: Can we do a mood check?
prompts.response: On a scale of 1 to 10, how would you rate your mood today? Remember, every feeling is temporary.

prompts.label: I feel overwhelmed.
prompts.response: You don't have to handle everything at once. Break tasks into smaller pieces and give yourself permission to rest.

prompts.label: Suggest mindfulness exercises.
prompts.response: Try this: Close your eyes, inhale for 4 seconds, hold for 4, and exhale for 4. Repeat five times.

features.title: Emotional Support
features.description: Empathetic conversations to help users feel heard and supported.

features.title: Mood Analysis
features.description: Identifies emotional patterns using intelligent sentiment analysis.

features.title: Wellness Tips
features.description: Provides mindfulness exercises, coping strategies, and self-care tips.

features.title: Crisis Guidance
features.description: Encourages seeking professional help and support during critical moments.
